  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:

  selector to the equivalent XPath expression.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/HTML-Selector-XPath/
  
  PR:             ports/115899
  Submitted by:   Shinsuke Matsui <smatsui at karashi.org>
